# Based News Reader

An automated news digest curation web application. Curated hourly by Google Gemini (`gemini-2.5-flash-lite`) from Google News RSS feeds based on user configurations, and served from a PostgreSQL database using a lightweight Flask backend.

> [Based News Reader Website](https://news.blakerayvid.com)

## Core URL Paths (Search Allowed)

- [Based News Home](https://news.blakerayvid.com/): Dynamic news digest homepage. Features a swipeable calendar carousel of hourly digests. Click any topic header to drill down into chronological daily headlines.
- [Forecast Dashboard](https://news.blakerayvid.com/forecast): Prediction tracking dashboard showing sector picks, price projections, and contextual market charts compiled via Yahoo Finance data.

## System Resources & Source Code

- [Configuration Settings Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1OjpsQEnrNwcXEWYuPskGRA5Jf-U8e_x0x3j2CKJualg/edit?usp=sharing): User management weights, target topics, keywords, and parameter configurations.
- [Project Source Repository](https://github.com/brayvid/based-news): Root repository containing both background worker systems and Flask application server code.
- [Blake Rayvid Portfolio](https://blakerayvid.com): Personal development profile of the system creator.
